MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT HINDSIGHT INSURANCE HINDS, MARK HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-17-2006 IN 206, DEFENDANT HINDSIGHT INSURANCE AND MARK HINDS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE - WAS HELD. THE MOTION WAS GRANTED. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. NO OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE JOHN CONWAY; CLERK: R. GOULDING; REPORTER: JANET POND, CSR # 5292 (206)
